type: CLAIM
files: src/jinja2/ext.py

type: INTENT
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Will add note/created/modified metadata parsing inside the while-loop of InternationalizationExtension.parse() and append a metadata dict param to _make_node(); will not touch _install_callables. Please let me know exact line ranges you touch in parse()/_make_node() so we can merge cleanly.

type: INTENT
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Adding domain param to trans tag: parse() while-loop (new 'domain' local var, intercepted when token.value=='domain' and next token is assign, string-literal validated), _make_node() gains trailing domain=None param appended after num_called_num, new module-level _make_new_dgettext/_make_new_dngettext helpers after _make_new_npgettext, _install_callables/_install/_install_null/_uninstall gain dgettext/dngettext params. Will re-read file before each edit and use narrow old_string anchors to avoid clobbering your metadata changes; suggest we each append our new _make_node param at the end of the signature so both additions coexist positionally.

type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Done: added note/created/modified metadata parsing to parse() while-loop and metadata param/trans_metadata attr to _make_node(); wrote patch.txt. My edits are localized (comma-check line, new block after 'token = parser.stream.expect("name")', _make_node signature/call, and end of _make_node body) - should be low-conflict with domain param additions elsewhere in same methods.

type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Domain feature complete: parse() adds 'domain' local + intercept in the assign branch (before generic variable assignment), _make_node signature gains trailing domain=None param, new module funcs _make_new_dgettext/_make_new_dngettext, _install/_install_null/_install_callables/_uninstall extended with dgettext/dngettext. All 830 existing tests pass. Wrote patch.txt.
